objective: Pilot downstream consumer-pulled governance package verification in knocktracker before broader rollout.
scope_boundary: Add governance rollout planning and execution-scope artifacts.
Coordinate downstream knocktracker issue #177 and PR evidence.
Record local and GitHub verification evidence.
Close the governance epic only after downstream pilot and Stage 6 closeout are complete.
out_of_scope: Changing central GitHub org/repo rulesets or repository settings.
Mutating downstream repos other than knocktracker pilot issue #177.
Rolling out to SaaS, HIPAA, LAM, or additional repos before pilot evidence is captured.
research_summary: Issue #398 added the non-mutating verifier and desired-state contract. Issue #403 consumes that package surface through a downstream pilot. The consumer repo should verify local managed files and pinned package ref while reporting central GitHub policy drift only.

sprints.name: Knocktracker consumer-pull verifier pilot
sprints.goal: Prove a downstream repo can pull and verify the governance package from its pinned consumer record.
tasks: Create governance and downstream issue-backed worktrees.
Add knocktracker repo-side workflow or equivalent check for the consumer verifier.
Run the verifier locally against knocktracker.
Publish downstream PR and confirm GitHub Actions passes.
Record governance closeout with downstream evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Knocktracker verifier workflow runs without copying governance package-core logic.
The verifier reads the pinned governance SHA from `.hldpro/governance-tooling.json`.
No downstream workflow mutates GitHub rulesets, branch protection, bypass actors, or repository settings.
Governance #403 closeout cites downstream issue, PR, merge commit, and validation evidence.

specialist_reviews.focus: Implement issue #177 repo-side verifier workflow without central-policy mutation.
specialist_reviews.summary: Worker subagent implemented the isolated knocktracker issue #177 workflow; orchestrator QA refreshed the managed pin, added hard verifier enforcement, and merged downstream PRs #178 and #179.

alternate_model_review.summary: Operator approved looping through the recommended next steps, testing locally, following repo rules, and spawning specialist subagents.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #403 may add governance planning, scope, roadmap mirror, review, validation, and closeout artifacts for the knocktracker consumer-pull pilot. Downstream implementation occurs under knocktracker issue #177.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Complete knocktracker pilot, publish PRs, verify GitHub checks, then Stage 6 closeout.

material_deviation_rules: If downstream adoption needs central GitHub settings mutation, stop and create a separate governance apply issue.
If knocktracker lacks prerequisites to run the verifier, document the blocker and do not expand rollout.
If package-core logic must change, patch hldpro-governance before changing downstream repos.
